# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

_format_version: "2.1"
services:
  - name: user-service
    url: http://user-service:8080
    routes:
      - name: user-service-route
        paths:
          - /users
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
        strip_path: true
    upstreams:
      - name: user-service-upstream
        targets:
          - target: user-service-1:8080
            weight: 100
          - target: user-service-2:8080
            weight: 100
        algorithm: round-robin
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          second: 10
          policy: local
          limit_by: consumer
  - name: order-service
    url: http://order-service:8080
    routes:
      - name: order-service-route
        paths:
          - /orders
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - DELETE
        strip_path: true
    upstreams:
      - name: order-service-upstream
        targets:
          - target: order-service-1:8080
            weight: 100
          - target: order-service-2:8080
            weight: 100
          - target: order-service-3:8080
            weight: 100
        algorithm: consistent-hashing
    plugins:
      - name: key-auth
        config:
          key_in_body: false
          key_in_header: true
          key_in_query: false
          key_names:
            - apikey
  - name: product-service
    url: http://product-service:8080
    routes:
      - name: product-service-route
        paths:
          - /products
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
        strip_path: true
    upstreams:
      - name: product-service-upstream
        targets:
          - target: product-service-1:8080
            weight: 100
          - target: product-service-2:8080
            weight: 100
        algorithm: least-connections
